message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam actorFontColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam lifelineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam lifelineBorderColor #000000
skinparam activationBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam activationBorderColor #000000
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowFontSize 12
skinparam arrowFontStyle normal
skinparam arrowFontName Arial
skinparam arrowTextAlign center
skinparam arrowTextDecoration none
skinparam arrowTextPosition center
skinparam arrowTextRotation 0
skinparam arrowTextSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextWrap true
skinparam arrowTextOverflow ellipsis
skinparam arrowTextMaxWidth 100
skinparam arrowTextMinWidth 50
skinparam arrowTextLineHeight 1.2
skinparam arrowTextLetterSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextWordSpacing 0
skinparam arrowTextIndent 0
skinparam arrowTextOutdent 0
skinparam arrowTextPadding 0
skinparam arrowTextMargin 0
skinparam arrowTextBorder 0
skinparam arrowTextBackground none
skinparam arrowTextShadow none
skinparam arrowTextTransform none
skinparam arrowTextDirection ltr
skinparam arrowTextWritingMode horizontal-tb
skinparam arrowTextUnicodeBidi normal
skinparam arrowTextDirectionality ltr
skinparam arrowTextBidirectionalOverride normal
skinparam arrowTextIsolation auto
skinparam arrowTextMixBlendMode normal
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundBlendMode normal
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundAttachment scroll
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPosition 0% 0%
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundRepeat repeat
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundOrigin padding-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundClip border-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundInlineSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundBlockSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalPosition 0% 0%
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPosition 0% 0%
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalRepeat repeat
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalRepeat repeat
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalOrigin padding-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalOrigin padding-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalClip border-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalClip border-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalInlineSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalInlineSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalBlockSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalBlockSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalPosition 0% 0%
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalPosition 0% 0%
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalRepeat repeat
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalRepeat repeat
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalOrigin padding-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalOrigin padding-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalClip border-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalClip border-box
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalInlineSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalInlineSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundLogicalLogicalBlockSize auto
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundPhysicalPhysicalBlockSize auto

title Portal Service

actor Player
participant "Telnet Server" as TelnetServer
participant "Connection Manager" as ConnectionManager
participant "Middleware" as Middleware
participant "World Service" as WorldService

Player -> TelnetServer: 1. connects to server
TelnetServer -> ConnectionManager: 2. passes connection to manager
activate ConnectionManager
ConnectionManager -> ConnectionManager: 3. calls configured OnConnect callbacks
ConnectionManager -> Middleware: 4. calls all Middleware OnConnect callbacks
ConnectionManager -> ConnectionManager: 5. start main Connection loop
ConnectionManager -> WorldService: 6. initialize World session
deactivate ConnectionManager

@enduml
